title: La Opala is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: La Opala is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at La Opala are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
